name: Divi 5 Technical Documentation
description: Community-maintained documentation for the Divi WordPress Theme
scope: Divi 5 only. Divi 4 is out of scope.

builder.description: Visual Builder and Theme Builder features

api.description: Hooks, filters, and custom module development

css-reference.description: CSS class names, selectors, and common overrides

frontmatter_schema.title: string, required — human-readable page title
frontmatter_schema.category: string, required — matches a key in categories above
frontmatter_schema.related: array of strings — slugs of related doc pages
frontmatter_schema.divi_version: string — Divi version this applies to (e.g. '5.x')
